# Resignation Letter

Dear [Boss's Name],

Please accept this email as formal notification that I have decided to resign from my position as [Your Job Title] at [Company Name]. My last day will be [Your Last Date]. I want to ensure that this decision is communicated clearly and respectfully as I move forward with my next steps.

After careful consideration, I have determined that it is the right time for me to resign due to a combination of factors. Primarily, I am seeking new career growth opportunities that align more closely with my long-term professional goals and skill development. Additionally, some personal circumstances have arisen that require my full attention and presence. These factors have led me to conclude that I must resign now to prioritize my well-being and future trajectory.

I am deeply grateful for the support and mentorship you have provided throughout my tenure and would like to express my sincere thanks for the opportunity to work alongside such a talented team. I will do everything possible to ensure a smooth transition, including completing pending projects and training my replacement. My plan for the transition includes:
*   Documenting all current workflows and processes in detail.
*   Overseeing the handover of critical files and client accounts.
*   Assisting with the recruitment and onboarding of my successor.

Thank you again for the opportunity to be part of this organization. I wish you and the company continued success in the future.
